title: helianthemum guttatum var. subaequisepalum
intro: Helianthemum guttatum var. subaequisepalum, also known as rockrose, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the Cistaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been found to aid in wound healing and the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The health benefits of rockrose include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, promote relaxation, and improve sleep quality due to its sedative properties. Rockrose can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being.
